name: codex-pro-skill
description: Package the Pro Review Orchestration Codex skill for high-context Extended Pro reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Scope and reconcile Extended Pro reviews
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill for sending scoped, redacted context packets to Extended Pro through the Codex in-app browser, then reconciling feedback against local state before acting.
defaultPrompt: Use $pro to review this plan before implementation.
Use $pro to review this implementation for ship readiness.
